vocab.example: The rooftop lounge of the skyscraper offers a stunning panoramic view of the entire city skyline.

vocab.meaning: nằm ẩn mình (ở một nơi yên tĩnh, ít người biết)
vocab.example: There is a charming little park tucked away behind the residential area that overlooks the river.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: Just an hour's drive from the city center, you can find picturesque landscapes with rolling hills and lush greenery.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che chắn/ngắt quãng
vocab.example: From the observation deck, visitors can enjoy an uninterrupted view of the sunset over the horizon.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (nhìn từ xa)
vocab.example: At night, the hill provides a vantage point to see the twinkling lights of the vast urban sprawl.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp đến ngạt thở
vocab.example: The coastal road is famous for its breathtaking scenery, especially during the autumn months.

vocab.meaning: điểm thuận lợi để quan sát (điểm nhìn)
vocab.example: The local bridge serves as an excellent vantage point for watching the traditional boat races on the canal.
I often go to the botanical garden early in the morning to behold the beauty of the blooming flowers.

vocab.meaning: độc đáo, cổ kính và thu hút
vocab.example: My neighborhood has a few quaint alleyways that offer a very peaceful and aesthetic view of old architecture.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt (cảnh tượng cực kỳ đẹp)
vocab.example: The flower festival in the city square is a real feast for the eyes with its vibrant colors and intricate displays.
